common.pricesMayVary: Prices may vary. Photos are illustrative. All items subject to availability.

hero.subtitle: Your neighborhood destination — eat, drink, shop, relax. Groceries, bar, kitchen, and massage & steam, all under one warm roof.

services.heading: Everything your day needs — under one roof.
services.intro: The Mall IWACU is the corner where errands, meals, drinks and rest come together. Pick a doorway.

groceries.title: Groceries
groceries.description: Daily essentials, fresh produce, and pantry staples — quick stops, fair prices, neighborly service.

bar.title: Bar
bar.description: Cold local beers, refreshing soft drinks, wines and a cocktail of the day — the easy way to wind down.

kitchen.title: Kitchen
kitchen.description: Home-cooked Rwandan plates, brochettes, grilled tilapia and daily buffet — comfort food, served warm.

spa.title: Massage & Steam
spa.description: Full-body massage, reflexology, herbal steam — slow down, breathe, reset right around the corner.

bar.label: From the Bar
bar.caption: Cold beers & cocktail of the day

whyUs.heading: A neighborhood gem — built for the everyday.
whyUs.lead: Iwacu means "at home," and that is the feeling we are after — wherever you walk through our doors, you should feel it the moment you arrive.

community.title: Community First
community.body: We were built around our neighbors. Familiar faces, friendly service, real conversations.

quality.title: Quality You Can Taste
quality.body: From fresh ingredients to attentive treatments — quality is the only standard we know.

convenience.title: All-In-One
convenience.body: Four services, one warm roof. Stop by once and leave with everything you needed.

location.title: Right Around the Corner
location.body: Easy to find in Kabeza — close enough that we are part of the everyday.

testimonials.heading: From the neighbors we feed, pour and pamper.
testimonials.intro: A few words from regulars. Want to add yours? Reply on WhatsApp after your visit.

footer.blurb: Your neighborhood destination in Kabeza, Kicukiro — eat, drink, shop, relax. All under one roof.

menu.title: Menu.
menu.subtitle: Tap a category. Search a dish. Prices in RWF.

book.title: Book a session.
book.subtitle: Four steps. Your start and finish times are calculated from the treatment you choose. We confirm on WhatsApp.

step1.title: Choose your treatment
step1.subtitle: Each service has its own duration. Pick one to see times.

step2.title: Pick a date
step2.subtitle: Booking opens up to {days} days ahead.

step3.title: Choose a time
step3.subtitleEmpty: Pick a service and date first.
step3.noTimes: No times available — try another day.

step4.title: Your details
step4.subtitle: We confirm bookings on WhatsApp. Add a quick note if you have one.
step4.name: Name
step4.hold: Your slot is held tentatively in your browser for 24 hours. Final confirmation comes when our team replies on WhatsApp.

slotReasons.leadTime: Too soon — needs at least 1h notice

book.messageBody: I'd like to book a massage / treatment:

contact.title: Contact.
contact.subtitle: Drop in, dial us up, or send a quick message — we are easy to reach.
contact.formHeading: Tell us how we can help.
contact.formIntro: Reservations, group bookings, treatment availability, or just to say hello — we respond on WhatsApp fastest.
contact.name: Name
contact.messagePlaceholder: What can we help you with?
contact.disclaimer: Your message will open in WhatsApp so we can reply quickly. We do not store anything on this site.

about.heading: A small place with a big welcome.
about.pullQuote: The Mall IWACU is your all-in-one neighborhood hub in the heart of Kabeza, Kicukiro.
about.pullSupport: Whether you are picking up fresh groceries, enjoying a cold drink at our bar, savoring home-cooked Rwandan meals, or treating yourself to a relaxing massage — we have got you covered, all under one roof.
about.storyHeading: Four small businesses, one shared idea.
about.story1: We started The Mall IWACU because the people of Kabeza deserve a place that fits how a real day actually goes — pick up tonight's dinner, sit down for a quick brochette, share a beer with a friend, then unwind with a steam before heading home.
about.story2: Every corner of the mall is run with care: produce we would buy ourselves, a kitchen that cooks how Rwandans cook at home, a bar that knows your usual, and a quiet wing for massage and steam when life asks too much.
about.story3: We are not a chain. We are a corner. And we are glad you are here.

community.title: Community
community.body: Built around our neighbors. The faces who walk in every day make this what it is.

quality.title: Quality
quality.body: From shelves to plates to treatments — we choose better, every day.

convenience.title: Convenience
convenience.body: Four services, one warm roof. Stop by once, leave with everything you needed.

hospitality.title: Hospitality
hospitality.body: Iwacu means at home — and that is exactly the welcome we serve.

about.ownerNote: We are a family-run business, proud of our corner. If something could be better — a dish, a service, a smile — please tell us. We listen, and we improve.

notFound.subtitle: That page is not on the table. But the rest of the mall is open — pull up a chair.
